meta_data.buildkite:git:commit:
commit 2e67fa756d05518823196815a30bc633031ddb60
abbrev-commit 2e67fa756
Author: Flora Feng <4florafeng@gmail.com>

    Fix tool_parser_cls type annotation from Callable to type[ToolParser] (#37957)
    
    Signed-off-by: sfeng33 <4florafeng@gmail.com>

pipeline.name: AMD CI
pipeline.description: The pipeline for the vLLM tests performed with AMD MI3XX backend
pipeline.configuration:
steps:
  - label: "bootstrap"
    key: bootstrap
    agents:
      queue: amd-cpu
    commands:
      - if [[ -n "$VLLM_CI_BRANCH" ]]; then VLLM_CI_BRANCH=$VLLM_CI_BRANCH curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/$VLLM_CI_BRANCH/buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash && exit 0; fi
      - curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/main/buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash

steps.name: bootstrap
steps.command:
if [[ -n "$VLLM_CI_BRANCH" ]]; then VLLM_CI_BRANCH=$VLLM_CI_BRANCH curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/$VLLM_CI_BRANCH/buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash && exit 0; fi
curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/main/buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash

jobs.name: bootstrap
jobs.command:
if [[ -n "" ]]; then VLLM_CI_BRANCH= curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra//buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash && exit 0; fi
curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/main/buildkite/bootstrap-amd.sh" | bash

jobs.name: AMD: :docker: build image
jobs.command:
docker build --build-arg max_jobs=16 --build-arg REMOTE_VLLM=1 --build-arg ARG_PYTORCH_ROCM_ARCH='gfx90a;gfx942;gfx950' --build-arg VLLM_BRANCH=2e67fa756d05518823196815a30bc633031ddb60 --tag rocm/vllm-ci:2e67fa756d05518823196815a30bc633031ddb60 -f docker/Dockerfile.rocm --target test --no-cache --progress plain .

docker push rocm/vllm-ci:2e67fa756d05518823196815a30bc633031ddb60

jobs.name: mi250_1: Pytorch Nightly Dependency Override Check
mi250_1: Async Engine, Inputs, Utils, Worker
mi250_1: Async Engine, Inputs, Utils, Worker, Config (CPU)
mi250_2: Distributed Compile + RPC Tests (2 GPUs)
mi250_2: Distributed Torchrun + Shutdown Tests (2 GPUs)

mi250_4: DP EP Distributed NixlConnector PD accuracy tests (4 GPUs)
mi250_2: NixlConnector PD + Spec Decode acceptance (2 GPUs)
mi250_4: CrossLayer KV layout Distributed NixlConnector PD accuracy tests (4 GPUs)
mi325_1: Entrypoints Integration (API Server openai - Part 1)
mi325_1: Entrypoints Integration (API Server openai - Part 2)
mi325_1: Entrypoints Integration (API Server openai - Part 3)
mi325_1: PyTorch Compilation Passes Unit Tests
mi325_2: Distributed Compile + RPC Tests (2 GPUs)
mi325_2: Distributed Torchrun + Shutdown Tests (2 GPUs)
mi325_2: Weight Loading Multiple GPU - Large Models

mi325_4: CrossLayer KV layout Distributed NixlConnector PD accuracy tests (4 GPUs)
mi325_4: LM Eval Large Models (4 GPUs)(FP8)
mi325_4: LM Eval Large Models (4 GPUs)(A100-MI325)
